background.text: a diagram model with stock Stock1 at 100 100

steps.text: I click select stock Stock1
I delete the selection
the diagram should not contain stock Stock1
the diagram stock count should be 1
the diagram should contain stock Stock2
flow Flow1 runs from stock Stock1 to stock Stock2
I click select stock Stock1
I delete the selection
the diagram should not contain stock Stock1
the diagram should not contain flow Flow1
the diagram should contain stock Stock2

scenarios.name: Deleting flow removes connectors on that flow

steps.text: flow Flow1 runs from stock Stock1 to stock Stock2
converter Converter1 at 100 250
connector Connector1 runs from converter Converter1 to flow Flow1
I click select flow Flow1
I delete the selection
the diagram should not contain flow Flow1
the diagram should not contain connector Connector1
the diagram should contain stock Stock1
the diagram should contain converter Converter1
converter Converter1 at 100 250
connector Connector1 runs from stock Stock1 to converter Converter1
I click select converter Converter1
I delete the selection
the diagram should not contain converter Converter1
the diagram should not contain connector Connector1
the diagram should contain stock Stock1
flow Flow1 runs from stock Stock1 to stock Stock2
I click select stock Stock1
I shift click select stock Stock2
I delete the selection
the diagram stock count should be 0
the diagram should not contain flow Flow1

scenarios.name: Delete with empty selection does nothing

steps.text: I delete the selection
the diagram stock count should be 2
the diagram should contain stock Stock1
the diagram should contain stock Stock2
